sections.title: What is a variable?
sections.text: A variable is a symbol (like x) that stands for an unknown value. In Nexaris Academy, we treat variables as glowing energy tokens you can swap and balance.

sections.title: Balancing equations
sections.text: Whatever you do to one side of an equation, do to the other. Imagine a floating scale on a knowledge island — keep both sides level.

sections.title: Quick practice
sections.text: Try solving: 3x + 2 = 11. Subtract 2 from both sides, then divide by 3. Answer: x = 3.
